meta.name: ghostty-web
meta.description: Ghostty for the web with xterm.js API compatibility

commits.msg: Bump package patch version to 0.4.5
Mitigate repeated single-cell click artifacts
Bump package patch version to 0.4.4
Hide native caret to prevent ghost cursor
Fix residual click selection across rows
Bump package patch version to 0.4.3
Fix stale single-click selection highlight
chore: bump version to 0.4.2
build: rebuild dist artifacts
fix: clear canvas before filling to support transparent backgrounds (#116)
fix: prevent clipboard overwrite on single click without selection
fix: wrap render loop in try/catch to prevent canvas freeze on exception
Merge pull request #1 from slang25/demo-updates
chore: update compiled dist files with renderer improvements
fix: enable selection and hyperlink visual rendering in tests
fix: render powerline glyphs as vector shapes for pixel-perfect alignment
fix: match baseline canvas CSS size to current canvas for visual comparison
fix: ensure current and baseline canvases display at same size
fix: use 2-column layout for test cases, keep current/baseline stacked
fix: use two-column grid layout for render test comparisons
feat: increase visual render test resolution to 2x
fix: read cursor style from buffer in visual render tests
fix: render block drawing characters as pixel-perfect rectangles
feat: add colorscript ASCII art visual render test
feat: add powerline prompt visual test and fix cell height rendering
fix: correct cell structure and font loading in visual render tests
fix: correct URL in usage note (serve uses clean URLs)
fix: remove SPA flag from test:render:web server
docs: add full URL to render test usage note
refactor: simplify render test web page - remove IndexedDB
